description: Korean laser technology specialist for semiconductor manufacturing. Successfully localized laser stealth dicing technology competing with DISCO's blade dicing (70%+ market share). Laser dicing has advantages for thin wafers (<200um) and HBM applications. Products: laser stealth dicing, laser markers, laser annealing, laser grooving equipment. FY2026 forecast revenue: 480B KRW (record).

majorClients: Samsung Electronics (CMP-0018) - laser dicing, marking, annealing
SK Hynix (CMP-0020) - laser stealth dicing for HBM
competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - indirect competitor: laser dicing vs blade dicing
DISCO (CMP-0002) - direct competitor: laser vs blade dicing (DISCO also offers laser)
_externalRelationships.notes: KOSDAQ listed. Market cap ~4,589B KRW. Stock price ~372,500 KRW. FY2026 forecast: revenue 480B KRW (record), operating profit +187.3% YoY. Laser stealth dicing is a technology shift threat to blade dicing: advantages for thin wafers (<200um), HBM stacking, and advanced packaging. Korean laser dicing localization reduces dependence on Japanese blade dicing from DISCO and Accretech. 52-week range: 120,600-380,000 KRW.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, EO Technics IR, Korean industry sources
